name: IngestOperationContracts
description: Concrete versioned request and result shapes for the eight public INGEST CLI operations.
schema_def: All operations use the common Tally operation envelope and reject unknown fields. Complex input uses --input - or --input @file; sourcePath is forbidden as a named argument.
ingest.preview input {contractVersion, sourcePath, accountId, actor}; result {batchId, manifestRevisionId?, status, adapter?, counts, reconciliationSummary, exactReplayOf?, retryAction?}

ingest.inspect input {batchId, manifestRevisionId}; result {manifest identity, versions, selected account, ordered record outcomes, candidates, exclusions, duplicates, conflicts, controls, approval state}
ingest.approve input {batchId, manifestRevisionId, manifestDigest, actor}; result {approvalId, batchId, manifestRevisionId, approvedAt}
ingest.commit input {batchId, manifestRevisionId, manifestDigest}; result ImportReceipt

ingest.status input {batchId?, limit?: 1..100 default 50, cursor?: opaque}; result BatchStatusDetail when batchId is present, otherwise {items: BatchStatusSummary[] ordered by updatedAt descending then batchId, nextCursor?}
ingest.abandon input {batchId, reason}; result {batchId, status: abandoned, retainedMetadata, priorLedgerEffectCount}
ingest.cleanup input {batchId, expectedTerminalStatus}; result {batchId, status: cleaned, removedArtifactKinds[]}
No contract exposes private store paths, source copies, PdfPig types, raw diagnostics, credentials, or private LEDGER types.
